name: Ningbo Bohui Chemical Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Ningbo Bohui Chemical Technology Co.,Ltd produces and sells aromatics, fuel oil, hydrocarbons, and other products in China. It offers rubber chemicals, plastic additives, asphalt additives, lubricant additives, and light fuel oil products. The company provides its products for use in rubber, plastic, asphalt, and lubrication oil processing, and other fields. It was formerly known as Ningbo Bohui Petrochemical Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Ningbo Bohui Chemical Technology Co.,Ltd in March 2014. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Ningbo, China. Ningbo Bohui Chemical Technology Co.,Ltd operates as a subsidiary of Ningbo Wenkui Holding Group Co.,Ltd.
